1.name: Ward 1
1.constituent_priorities: Basic services, roads, water reliability, community safety. Split between service-delivery demands and social grant dependency.

2.name: Ward 2
2.constituent_priorities: Housing delivery, municipal employment, basic service consistency.

3.name: Ward 3
3.constituent_priorities: Housing allocation, informal settlement formalisation, employment, social grants.

4.name: Ward 4
4.constituent_priorities: Housing formalisation, employment, social grants, basic services. Petros is also Garden Route District rep.

5.name: Ward 5
5.constituent_priorities: Rural service delivery, forestry livelihoods, road maintenance, water access. Geographically dispersed.

7.name: Ward 7
7.constituent_priorities: ANC patronage delivery — housing, jobs, grants. Khumelwana is Council Whip.

9.name: Ward 9
9.constituent_priorities: Property values, infrastructure quality, baboon management, Leisure Isle sea wall, estuary health.
9.key_revenue: Leisure Isle, Pezula, The Heads - highest property values + tourism

10.name: Ward 10
10.constituent_priorities: Business environment, street safety, municipal reliability, tourism-facing infrastructure.

11.name: Ward 11
11.constituent_priorities: Forestry industry employment, basic service access, school infrastructure.
